# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for our complete application stack (VPC, EC2, RDS, S3, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure components. We'll add CloudWatch alarms and detailed monitoring after we deploy and verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPC'
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.0.0/16'
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true

  Subnet1:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: '10.0.1.0/24'

  Subnet2:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: '10.0.2.0/24'

  SecurityGroupEC2:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup'
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: EC2 Security Group
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  Ec2Instance:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Instance'
    Properties:
      ImageId: ami-abcd1234
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      NetworkInterfaces:
        - DeviceIndex: '0'
          SubnetId: !Ref Subnet1
          GroupSet:
            - !Ref SecurityGroupEC2

  RDSDB:
    Type: 'AWS::RDS::DatabaseInstance'
    Properties:
      DatabaseName: mydb
      Engine: mysql
      MasterUsername: myuser
      MasterUserPassword: mypass
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !GetAtt Ec2Instance.SecurityGroupId
      DBInstanceClass: db.t2.micro

  S3Bucket:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'

  ElasticIP:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::ElasticIP'
    Properties:
      Domain: standard

  LoadBalancer:
    Type: 'AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::LoadBalancer'
    Properties:
      Subnets:
        - !Ref Subnet1
        - !Ref Subnet2
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref SecurityGroupEC2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: mylb

  LoadBalancerTargetGroup:
    Type: 'AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::TargetGroup'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Port: 80
      Protocol: HTTP
      HealthCheckProtocol: HTTP
      TargetType: instance
      Targets:
        - Id: !GetAtt Ec2Instance.InstanceId

  LoadBalancerListener:
    Type: 'AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::Listener'
    Properties:
      DefaultAction:
        - TargetGroupArn: !GetAtt LoadBalancerTargetGroup.TargetGroupArn
      LoadBalancerArn: !Ref LoadBalancer
      Port: 80
      Protocol: HTTP

Outputs:
  VPCId: !Ref VPC
  Ec2InstanceId: !GetAtt Ec2Instance.InstanceId
  RDSDBInstanceARN: !GetAtt RDSDB.DBInstanceArn
  S3BucketName: !Ref S3Bucket
  ElasticIP: !Ref ElasticIP
